design_2x2.data_condition_rule: clean = SGCD shock F0; stressed = any semantic shock (F1 missingness, F2 ambiguity, F4 contradiction)
design_2x2.pressure_rule: low = control-category schedules only; high = non-control schedules (ramp, shock)

grounding.ambiguous_layer_note: Only the DETERMINISTIC layer of the BankingCase ground truth anchors scenarios in v0; the AMBIGUOUS layer (~60% of cases) is excluded and such anchors are rejected by the generator.

excluded_anchors.DET-05: amount_usd threshold; credit_amount excluded from READING pool
excluded_anchors.DET-10: APPROVE rule needs compound low-risk+clean+complete condition; single-metric anchor would misstate the rule
excluded_anchors.DET-13: CONDITIONAL rule anchored on a risk range, not a single threshold

policy_source.note: Threshold values and rule ids transcribed as literals at design time; no upstream source files are committed to ftm-benchmark.

grounding.reading_derivation_note: risk_score and completeness readings are band-sampled from each SGCD record's label / shock code — derived values, never verbatim record fields (verbatim: false in per-scenario provenance).

reading_pool_exclusions.credit_amount: DM/USD unit mismatch with BankingCase amount_usd; the only amount-based rule (DET-05, $1,000,000) could never trigger with SGCD credit amounts <= ~18,424 DM.

lang_note: English-only in v0 by design decision.

tool_vocabulary_note: Fixed 5-name vocabulary aligned to BankingCase TransactionType for standalone model-mode packs; a real AgentProfile's ACTION tools replace it via the tool_names parameter for agentic runs.
